description_long: This object is a wooden sword with a simple, robust design, featuring a straight, broad blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade is unadorned and has a light, natural wood grain finish, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. The crossguard is a flat, rectangular piece of wood that extends horizontally, providing basic hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and slightly contoured, ending in a rounded pommel for a secure grip. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments on any part of the sword. The overall construction suggests it is a training or toy sword, likely intended for safe practice or play.
description: A plain, light wood sword with a straight, pointed blade, flat crossguard, and rounded handle, all in a natural finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat blade, rectangular crossguard, and rounded handle with visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's flatness and pointed tip.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same broad blade, crossguard, and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness of the blade and handle, with the pointed tip clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, plain wood, rounded pommel, no visible grip texture
